Class SigNozLoggingProperties

java.lang.Object
io.signoz.springboot.properties.SigNozLoggingProperties
@ConfigurationProperties(prefix="signoz.logging") public class SigNozLoggingProperties extends Object
Logging-specific configuration nested under signoz.logging.*. 
signoz:
  logging:
    mode: BOTH
    mask-enabled: true
    masked-fields:
      - password
      - creditCard
      - ssn
      - authorization
    custom-patterns:
      - name: internalToken
        regex: "token=[A-Za-z0-9]+"
